title: REI Plugin Compatibilities
description: Workaround for mods accessing JEI apis
body:
This is an external REI module to workaround issues brought forward by mods accessing JEI apis, by remapping those usages back to their REI equivalent code.

This module is extremely unstable, invokes terrible hacks, and should be used as a last resort.

**This mod must be used in companion with Roughly Enough Items.**
